expanded_keywords: Trump Iran war close to over

results.title: Live updates: White House optimistic about Iran deal as key Pakistani negotiator visits Tehran
results.snippet: White House feels 'good about prospects of a deal' with Iran. Pakistani Field Marshal Asim Munir in Tehran for mediation.

results.title: Iran live updates: Trump says war with Iran is 'very close to over'
results.snippet: Trump told Fox Business that the war is 'very close to over' and talks could resume within days.

results.title: Iran war live: Pakistani army chief in Tehran amid bid to restart US talks
results.snippet: Field Marshal Asim Munir arrives in Tehran with US message. Iran threatens Red Sea blockade.

results.title: Iran war 'very close to over,' Trump says — and the stock market 'is going to boom'
results.snippet: Trump says war is 'very close to over', stock market will boom. S&P 500 approaches record high.

results.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 47 of the US-Iran conflict?
results.snippet: Day 47 of the US-Iran conflict. CENTCOM says blockade has 'completely halted' Iran's sea trade.

results.title: Trump says Iran talks could resume in days as U.S. military blocks Iranian ports
results.snippet: Trump says Iran negotiations could resume in Pakistan 'within days'. Uranium enrichment remains main sticking point.

results.title: LIVE UPDATES: Conflict in the Middle East (April 15, 2026)
results.snippet: Death toll in Middle East has climbed to nearly 6,000 people since US and Israel began strikes on Iran.

results.title: Blockade completely halts Iran shipping, US military says. So why are some ships going through Strait of Hormuz?
results.snippet: CENTCOM says blockade has completely halted Iran's economic sea trade. But some ships still going through Hormuz.

results.title: US military says blockade of Iran ports 'completely' halts economic trade
results.snippet: In less than 36 hours, US forces have completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea. 10,000+ sailors, Marines, Air Force involved.

searches.keyword: Asim Munir Tehran April 2026 Pakistan mediator

results.title: Iran War: Pakistan Army Chief Arrives in Tehran to Mediate Peace Talks
results.snippet: Pakistan's Field Marshal Asim Munir arrives in Tehran carrying US message. Plans to coordinate second round of US-Iran talks.

results.title: Pakistan army chief in Tehran to advance next round of US-Iran talks
results.snippet: Asim Munir in Tehran to deliver US message and persuade Iran to return to negotiating table. Described as 'Trump's favorite field marshal'.

results.title: Pakistan's Army chief Asim Munir in Tehran to deliver US message
results.snippet: Munir arrived with Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi as part of ongoing mediation efforts between US and Iran.

results.title: Pakistan army chief in Tehran for talks with Iranian foreign minister ahead of expected fresh US talks
results.snippet: Munir meeting Iranian FM Araghchi. Munir has rapport with Trump and knows IRGC leadership from his intelligence days.

searches.keyword: Iran blockade shipping Red Sea threat April 2026

results.title: Live updates: Iran threatens shipping in Gulf, Red Sea; Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade continues
results.snippet: Iran's IRGC announces Tehran would not allow import/export through Persian Gulf, Gulf of Oman and Red Sea unless US lifts blockade.

results.title: Iran issues new threat to further destabilize global trade via Red Sea
results.snippet: Iran threatens to disrupt shipping in Red Sea in retaliation for US blockade. Commander Ali Abdollahi warns of 'firm and decisive' steps.

results.title: Iran threatens to disrupt shipping in Red Sea unless US lifts Hormuz blockade
results.snippet: Iran military warns will block Red Sea along with Gulf and Sea of Oman if US blockade continues.

results.title: Iran military warns will block Red Sea if US naval blockade continues
results.snippet: Khatam al-Anbiya Central HQ Commander Ali Abdollahi issues first formal Red Sea blockade threat.

results.title: Iran says $270bn war loss must be compensated, as fresh talks with US loom
results.snippet: Iran estimates $270 billion in total war losses. Demands compensation from US, Israel, and 5 Gulf states (Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, UAE, Jordan).

results.title: Iran Demands War Reparations From 5 Arab States
results.snippet: Iran's UN envoy accuses 5 Arab states of breaching international law by allowing US military operations from their territory.

results.title: Iran Puts War Losses at $270 Billion, Demands Reparations from Gulf Countries
results.snippet: Iran puts a $270 billion price tag on war losses, seeks reparations from Gulf states.

results.title: Oil prices fall as renewed hopes for peace talks feed a stock market rally
results.snippet: Oil prices continue to fall. WTI at $91.29, Brent at $94.93. Peace talk hopes drive stock market rally.

results.title: S&P 500 hits record high as Iran peace hopes lift markets
results.snippet: S&P 500 surges to 7,005.78, exceeding January 28 peak of 7,002.28. First record high since war began.

results.title: S&P 500 Nears Record Close as Ceasefire Optimism Lifts Stocks
results.snippet: S&P 500 closes in on record. Rally driven by Trump's 'close to over' comments and Pakistan mediation.

results.title: Oil prices: Possible U.S.-Iran talks revive hopes of easing Hormuz tensions
results.snippet: Brent added 48 cents to $95.27 after falling 4.6% previous day. Oil remains well below peak of $119.

results.title: U.S. declares blockade 'fully implemented,' cutting off Iran's seaborne trade 'completely'
results.snippet: CENTCOM Admiral Brad Cooper: blockade 'fully implemented'. 10,000+ personnel deployed.

searches.keyword: CENTCOM blockade halts Iran trade completely April 15 2026

results.title: CENTCOM: U.S. Blockade Fully Implemented, Halting 90% of Iran's Sea Trade
results.snippet: CENTCOM says 90% of Iran's economy is fuelled by international trade by sea. Blockade 'fully implemented'.

results.title: CENTCOM: US naval blockade of Iranian ports 'fully implemented'
results.snippet: CENTCOM: More than 10,000 sailors, Marines and Air Force personnel involved. 6 merchant ships turned back in first 24 hours.

searches.keyword: S&P 500 record high Iran war peace April 15 2026

results.title: S&P 500 hits first intraday record high since U.S.-Iran war
results.snippet: S&P 500 touches first intraday record high since US-Iran conflict began. Rose over 2% during the week, 9.8% since March 30.

results.title: Wall Street hits a record as S&P 500 continues its 2-week rally on hopes for an end to the Iran war
results.snippet: S&P 500 2-week rally driven by hopes of Iran war ending. Third straight weekly gain.

searches.keyword: US Iran peace talks mediation latest

results.title: US-Iran talks: What's the latest on mediation efforts?
results.snippet: Iran counter-offered 3-5 year moratorium vs US 20-year demand. Both sides considering ceasefire extension.

results.title: Pakistan proposes second round of U.S.-Iran talks as standoff deepens
results.snippet: Pakistan proposes hosting second in-person meeting in Islamabad. Diplomatic efforts to restart talks gain momentum.

searches.keyword: Iran nuclear enrichment moratorium ceasefire April 2026

results.title: Why are the US, Iran arguing over duration of uranium enrichment ban?
results.snippet: US proposed 20-year moratorium. Iran countered with 5-year suspension. US rejected Iran's counter-proposal. Ceasefire expires April 21-22.

results.title: Mediators rush to revive U.S.-Iran nuclear talks before ceasefire expires
results.snippet: Mediators rushing to revive talks before ceasefire expires. Both sides considering extending ceasefire by additional two weeks.
